feat.name: Positioning Assault
feat.text: With punishing blows, you force your opponent into position. Make a Strike with the required weapon. If you hit, you Reposition the target 5 feet.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.

feat.requirement: You are wielding a two-handed melee weapon and your target is within your reach
